text: A recipe for pancakes uses flour and milk in the ratio 1 : 3. If you use 200 g of flour, how much milk do you need?
generatorSolution: The ratio of flour to milk is 1 : 3. This means for every 1 part of flour, you need 3 parts of milk. If flour = 200 g, that is 1 part. So 1 part = 200 g. Milk = 3 parts = 3 × 200 g = 600 g.
